title: Ethanium bracteosum
taxonomy: Ethanium bracteosum is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is commonly known as a type of carrot or parsnip. The classification of Ethanium bracteosum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Apiales, Family: Apiaceae, Genus: Ethanium, Species: E. bracteosum. This classification groups Ethanium bracteosum with other plants that share similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The exact classification may vary depending on the source or specific classification system used.
